subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! The bestowals and outpourings of the Ancient Beauty, like unto a vast ocean, have flooded the Kingdom of existence from the unseen realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی عنایات و فیوضات جمال قدم چون بحر اعظم ملکوت وجود را از غیب و
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation
